message:
feat(web): world-class UI/UX redesign with Terminal Noir aesthetic

Complete visual overhaul of the ACFS web application:

Landing page:
- Stunning hero section with cosmic gradient background
- Animated terminal component showing installation progress
- Feature cards with gradient hover effects and glow
- Tools ticker, stats badges, and premium typography

Design system (globals.css):
- Deep space color palette with OKLCH colors
- Electric cyan primary, warm amber accents, magenta highlights
- Comprehensive animation keyframes (gradient-shift, float, pulse-glow, shimmer, confetti-fall)
- Background effects (cosmic gradients, grid patterns, noise texture)
- Glass morphism, glow effects, and premium shadows

Wizard experience:
- Premium sidebar with gradient progress bar
- Beautiful step indicators with connection lines
- Active step glow animation, green checkmarks for completed
- Mobile-optimized bottom navigation with animated dots
- Confetti celebration on wizard completion

Components:
- Premium command cards with terminal icon and shimmer copy effect
- Enhanced stepper with status labels and visual polish
- OS selection cards with detected badge and sparkles animation

Typography:
- JetBrains Mono for terminal/code elements
- Instrument Sans for body text
- Dark mode as primary theme

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
